title: quercus ilex f. ambigua
intro: Quercus ilex f. ambigua, also known as the holm oak, is a subspecies of the holm oak tree (Quercus ilex) native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Quercus ilex f. ambigua include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as having immunomodulatory and antiviral effects. The plant is often prepared in herbal tea, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
